---
title: "Data acquisition and cleanup"
author: "Bongani Mnyandli"
date: "01/05/2026"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## data_acqusition

The data consists of three files:

1.  SummarisedExperiment object: An object containing counts, scaled counts, length-sclaed counts and abundances of RNAseq data. for Predict

2.  Connecting data: A metadata set with information connecting pids to timepoints to sequencing names and batches etc.

3.  A clinical dataset.

```{r}

# Summarized Experimental data
gcs <- readRDS("C:/MSc.Molecular_Biology/my_masters_Project/data/comprnaseq_prdtonly_gene_cnt_scld_lenscld_abund_20250624.rds")

# Clinical data
clindat <- readRDS("C:/MSc.Molecular_Biology/my_masters_Project/data/Predict_clindat_final_14Aug25.rds")

# Connecting data
condat <- readRDS("C:/MSc.Molecular_Biology/my_masters_Project/data/n2s_clindat_touse_predict_alloutcs_30Jun25.rds")
```

You can add options to executable code like this

```{r}

```
